# Data Science: Methods, Tools, and Best Practices
Confidence: low (0.475) (verified)
Last verified: 2026-05-24
Generation: ai_structured

## TL;DR
Data science combines statistics, computer science, and domain expertise to extract insights from data. The modern workflow ‚Äî from data wrangling through machine learning to deployment ‚Äî is supported by Python's ecosystem and cloud infrastructure.

## Core Explanation
The data science lifecycle: problem formulation‚Üídata acquisition‚Üícleaning‚ÜíEDA‚Üífeature engineering‚Üímodeling‚Üíevaluation‚Üídeployment‚Üímonitoring. Data quality is the dominant determinant of project success ‚Äî "garbage in, garbage out."

## Detailed Analysis
Statistical foundations: probability distributions, hypothesis testing, confidence intervals. ML paradigms: supervised (classification, regression), unsupervised (clustering, dimensionality reduction), reinforcement learning. Model evaluation must match business objectives.

- Kaggle: Data Science Competitions
- Towards Data Science
